steps.title: Identify what “emphasize size” requires
steps.content: The question asks which choice “most effectively uses information to emphasize the size.” To emphasize means to highlight something as significant—not just mention a measurement factually, but present it in a way that makes the size stand out as remarkable or noteworthy.

steps.title: Apply this to the choices
steps.content: Choice D emphasizes size by using the word “massive” to describe the crater and pairing it with the specific measurement “3.2 km in diameter.” Choices A and B omit the diameter, while C includes the measurement but treats it as neutral fact without any language highlighting its significance. This matches choice D — D is correct.
